title: CHILD AND FAMILY THERAPY - 211info
text: OLD MILL CENTER FOR CHILDREN AND FAMILIES ALBANY CHILD AND FAMILY THERAPY Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers counseling services for families and children. 528 SW Ellsworth Street Albany, OR 97322 Eligibility: Individual and Family Counseling: Families with children ages 3-18 Hours: By appointment Email (541) 757-8068 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 757-8068 Intake (541) 757-8068 Clinical Support Specialist Hannah Altimus [email protected] Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information or appointment. Referrals will require health insurance information. FEES: Varies by service and insurance plan. DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable. LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Benton, Lincoln, and Linn Counties TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Public transportation is available at this location Services: Adolescent/Youth Counseling Family Counseling Other Services Offered At This Location: INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - HEALTHY FAMILIES REHABILITATION/HABILITATION SERVICES - PEDIATRIC OCCUPATIONAL AND PHYSICAL THERAPY If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. OLD MILL CENTER FOR CHILDREN AND FAMILIES ALBANY
